title: Frontend: Drag-and-Drop Reordering and Test Mode
description: Implement drag-and-drop reordering for sections within forms and questions within sections. Use HTML5 drag API or a lightweight library. Implement test mode: validate form structure client-side, then call sandbox backend endpoint. Display test results (visible sections/questions, formula outputs) without persisting.

statusHistory.comment: Implemented test mode for form, section, and question editors using enhanced preview mode (FormViewPageClient with interactive prop). Added backend sandbox endpoints for section/question testing (POST /admin/sections/:id/test, POST /admin/questions/:id/test). Frontend: FormTestOverlay modal, TestResultsPanel, 'Test' buttons in editor lists. Removed deprecated admin/preview/ routes.
